definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: It's a company policy.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Un curso o principio de acción adoptado o propuesto por un gobierno, partido, negocio o individuo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A course or principle of action adopted or proposed by a government, party, business, or individual.

definitions.usage_example: She has a life insurance policy.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: She has a life insurance policy.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Un contrato de seguro.]

definitions.usage_example: He is receiving treatment for cancer.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He is receiving treatment for cancer.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Atención médica dada a un paciente por una enfermedad o lesión.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Medical care given to a patient for an illness or injury.

definitions.usage_example: His treatment of his employees is bad.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: His treatment of his employees is bad.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: La forma en que uno se comporta o trata a alguien o algo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The way one behaves toward or deals with someone or something.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Do you have a recommendation?]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Una sugerencia o propuesta sobre el mejor curso de acción.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A suggestion or proposal as to the best course of action.
